---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Crawly
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Crawly does not let you do today?

## The idea

Describe the feature you have in mind. If there is a UI, sketch it in words
or pictures.

## Alternatives you considered

Anything you tried, thought about, or ruled out.

## Extras

Links to prior art in other tools, related issues, or examples of the kind of
page or app where this would help.
